name: phototrol-face-embed-sidecar
description: Loopback-only HTTP service that embeds face images into 128-d descriptors using face-api.js. Locked to the same 3 models the Phototrol browser uses (tinyFaceDetector + faceLandmark68Net + faceRecognitionNet), so descriptors land in the same vector space as existing pht_faces rows — no re-embedding required.
